items.title:
R to @drawthingsapp: ✨ While LoRAs aren't always a must, The Quality Slider LoRA (0.5 - BETA) gives you much finer control over your results.

📸 Check out these comparisons: the same prompt with different LoRA weights. I believe these results will speak for themselves and spark some new ideas for your workflow!

🔗 LoRA Link: https://civitai.com/models/2329296?modelVersionId=2620218

items.title:
📈 Level Up Your Image Quality in Draw Things!

🌟 Stop settling for average results. Use this power-prompt to enhance the overall quality.

💡 Pro Tip: For even more precision, check out the recommended LoRA in the comments.
